Title: Metamorphosis - Part 2

Plot: The Shibuya incident is coming to an end and many groups of jujutsu sorcerers are getting ready for what may happen next. Meanwhile, Yuji's victory over Mahito is short-lived as the two are confronted by the mastermind behind ever...
